name: drawer
visual_summary: The Drawer UI component is a slide-in panel used for displaying additional content, navigation or other UI elements. It is typically used from a fixed trigger and can be used for providing additional information, showcasing features, or managing settings. A developer would use this component when needing to provide additional context without changing the current view.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready drawer component with the following characteristics:

Name: drawer
Description: The Drawer UI component is a slide-in panel used for displaying additional content, navigation or other UI elements. It is typically used from a fixed trigger and can be used for providing additional information, showcasing features, or managing settings. A developer would use this component when needing to provide additional context without changing the current view.
Style: mobile-responsive, desktop-responsive
Interactions: clickable, keyboard-navigable, draggable
Tags: navigation, information, settings

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
